case_title: SARATOGA CAPITAL, INC., A CALIF CORPORATION vs. COLE, PATRICIA D. et al

docket_entries.description: SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

#1 JDG WICK. CSR JOHN LEWIS. CLERK G. VAN HEST. 2:15 PM C/C FOR SETTL CONF. COUNSEL, BERNERD LIBANTI, PRESENT FOR PLTF; DEFTS PATRICIA COLE AND JAMES LYNCH PRESENT IN PRO PER. A DEFAULT WILL BE ENTERED AS TO LORETTA LYNCH. A STIPULATED JUDGMENT WAS READ INTO THE RECORD IN FAVOR OF PLTF. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLE, PATRICIA D. LYNCH, LORETTA LYNCH, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 388 FIFTH ST. #1 SF $350.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $350.00, STAYED UNTIL JAN-15-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT OF POSSESSION MAY ISSUE FORTHWITH, BUT THE PHYSICAL EVICTION OF THE DEFTS IS STAYED TO MIDNIGHT, 1/15/94, ON THE CONDITION THEY PAY THE SUM OF $350. BY 7PM ON DEC. 14,1993. FAILURE TO DO SO, THIS STAY MAY BE TERMINATED ON 1/2/94 MIDNIGHT UPON PLTF'S WRITTEN EXPARTE APPLICATION.
